goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'sunday'.
The train should 'arrive by 21:30' and should go to 'london liverpool street'.
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for '6 people'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have 'a star of 3' and should 'include free parking'.
The hotel 'doesn't need to include internet'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'free wifi'.
Make sure you get 'hotel type' and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on sunday
The train should arrive by 21:30 and should go to london liverpool street
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 6 people
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should have a star of 3 and should include free parking
The hotel doesn't need to include internet
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has free wifi
Make sure you get hotel type and address
